title: TÜBİTAK ARDEB Fundings

KHAS Silivri Teknopark

SUPPORT PROGRAMS

International Programs

RESEARCH

Research Facilities

MyKHAS

Türkçe

1001 – Scientific and Technological Research Projects Support Program

The purpose of the Scientific and Technological Research Projects Support Program is to support projects that comply with scientific principles in order to produce new information, make scientific interpretations or solve technological problems.

For detailed information:

https://www.tubitak.gov.tr/tr/destekler/akademik/ulusal-destek-programlari/icerik-1001-bilimsel-ve-teknolojik-arastirma-projelerini-destekleme-programi

1002 – Rapid Support Program

The purpose of the Rapid Support Program is to provide support for urgent, short-term, small-budget research and development projects to be carried out in universities, research hospitals and research institutes.

For detailed information:

https://www.tubitak.gov.tr/tr/destekler/akademik/ulusal-destek-programlari/icerik-1002-hizli-destek-programi

1003 – Priority Areas R&D Projects Support Program

The purpose of this support program is to support R&D projects that are result-oriented, have traceable goals, observe the dynamics of relevant science/technology fields and are carried out domestically in priority areas to be determined within the framework of the National Science, Technology and Innovation Strategy and to ensure coordination between these projects.

For detailed information:

https://www.tubitak.gov.tr/tr/destekler/akademik/ulusal-destek-programlari/icerik-1003-oncelikli-alanlar-ar-ge-projeleri-destekleme-programi

1005 – National New Ideas and Products Research Support Program

The purpose of the program; is to support applied research and/or experimental development projects aimed at developing a new national/international product/process/method/model that will reduce our technological dependency on foreign sources and/or increase our country’s competitiveness.

For detailed information:

https://www.tubitak.gov.tr/tr/destekler/akademik/ulusal-destek-programlari/icerik-1005-ulusal-yeni-fikirler-ve-urunler-arastirma-destek-programi

The purpose of the Career Development Program is to encourage the work of PhD scientists who have just started their careers by providing project support. It is a program aimed at supporting the work of young researchers who will undertake the academic leadership of the 21st century, both for young scientists to continue their careers as researchers and educators in the best way possible, and for the development of our scientific level and the increase of the role of science in the development of the country.

For detailed information:

https://www.tubitak.gov.tr/tr/destekler/akademik/ulusal-destek-programlari/icerik-3501-kariyer-gelistirme-programi

3005 – Innovative Solutions Research Projects Support Program in Social and Human Sciences

The purpose of the Innovative Solutions Research Projects Support Program in Social and Human Sciences is;

1. Developing methods, approaches and interpretations that will make innovative contributions to science in light of the findings of the situation determination studies through data collection and analysis in human sciences;

2. Establishing scientific foundations in the development processes of public policies;

3. Providing social and public benefit in our country by supporting structured output and impact-oriented social and human science research and development activities in order to reveal the social effects of technological advances.

For detailed information:

https://www.tubitak.gov.tr/tr/destekler/akademik/ulusal-destek-programlari/icerik-3005-sosyal-ve-beseri-bilimlerde-yenilikci-cozumler-arastirma-projeleri-destek-programi
